## What are you suggesting?
<!-- Link + one honest sentence on what it does -->

- **[Name](https://link)** — what it does and when to use it.

## Which section does it belong in?
<!-- e.g. RAG, Agents, Frameworks, a cheatsheet, etc. -->

## Why is it worth adding?
<!-- What makes it high-signal? Is it maintained? -->

## Checklist
- [ ] It's actively maintained (or a stable, canonical resource).
- [ ] It's not already in the list.
- [ ] The description is specific and honest (no marketing copy).
